name: 品玉庵异谈   PinYuAn Tales
short_description: PinYuAn Tales is a AVG with thematic elements of weirdness and sidekick adventures. After Bai Qiming is laid off from his company, he starts to conduct psychic live broadcasting activities, and during one of the broadcasts, he meets a strange young man, and the story of the two of them unfolds.
detailed_description:
PinYuAn Tales is a text-based AVG with thematic elements of weirdness and sidekick adventures.
The main character Bai Qiming, who is engaged in the game art industry, was laid off during the hard time of employment, and trying to find a way to change his career to the psychic media, he met a strange young man in a live broadcast, and was involved in a series of strange events in the daily life of the end and where to go from here.
Weirdness and friendship, dreams and reality, the future of the road and the hidden truth by you to discover to explore.

character






About the game content

◈The full plot is about 85,000 words of text and nearly 30 beautiful CGs for 2~4 hours of play.
◈The ending consists of 5 BE + 1NE + 1HE, with an additional chapter of plot included after the HE.
◈The game contains psychic horror, death, gore, and supernatural elements and contains Bromance tendencies, so please use your discretion to purchase as needed.
◈The game contains a small number of reflections on the direction of life, the workplace, reality/idealism, the future and other related abstract issues, in the hope that it can bring empathy and encouragement to peers who are also in a state of anxiety and confusion in the difficult employment environment of the Great Layoff.

About the Production Team

◈小青蛙妙妙制作组
An indie game Team formed by two friends from college.
◈Script - Programming - UI - Art - Video：青蛙梨
◈Character Design - Art：阿猹
◈weibo:@小青蛙妙妙制作组
I hope to receive more feedback on your play!
